prompt: Side-view 2D fighting game showing two martial artists in mid-combat on a traditional Japanese dojo stage. One character executing a spinning kick while the other blocks with glowing energy. Include health bars, special move meters, combo counter, round timer, and directional input display. Dynamic lighting with particle effects for impacts and traditional wooden architecture in background
prompt_refined: Generate a side-view screenshot of a 2D fighting game. Two martial artists are in mid-combat on a traditional Japanese dojo stage. The character on the left is executing a spinning kick, while the character on the right blocks the attack, radiating glowing energy. The background features detailed traditional wooden architecture. Essential game UI elements are clearly visible: player 1's health bar and special move meter are in the top-left corner, and player 2's health bar and special move meter are in the top-right corner. A round timer is centered at the very top of the screen. A combo counter is displayed in the upper-middle section of the screen. A directional input display is located in the bottom-left corner. Dynamic lighting illuminates the scene, with vivid particle effects at the point of impact between the kick and block.
objects: Martial artist on the left executing a spinning kick
Martial artist on the right blocking attack
Glowing energy radiating from character on the right
Player 1's health bar and special move meter in top-left corner
Player 2's health bar and special move meter in top-right corner
Round timer centered at the very top of the screen
Combo counter in the upper-middle section of the screen
Directional input display in the bottom-left corner
Vivid particle effects at the point of impact
